reviews.comment:
Le dije que carguen infinia y me cargaron super... Tuve q salir corriendo a buscar al playero, encima me cobraron por el error, no los recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I told them to charge Infinia and they charged me super... I had to run out to find the beach attendant, and on top of that they charged me for the mistake. I don't recommend them.

reviews.comment:
Una mugre. Somos socios del ACA y en general los baños de las estaciones están limpios. En este practicamente no se podía entrar. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
Filthy. We're members of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and generally the restrooms at the stations are clean. This one was practically unusable. A disgrace.
